title: Me and my language — новые слова

items.example: My mother tongue is Russian, but I speak English fluently.
She speaks Spanish with great fluency.
His grammar is good, but he needs to work on accuracy.
Teenagers often use slang that older people don't understand.
Computer programmers use a lot of technical jargon.
Being bilingual has many cognitive advantages.
I practice with native speakers to improve my pronunciation.
Good learning strategies can help you acquire a language faster.
Listening is the hardest skill for me in English.
Living in a foreign country is a great way to learn the language.
